modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't download VitalSource Bookshelf from Microsoft Store.

full_description_text: 
User is trying to download the VitalSource Bookshelf app from the Microsoft Store. They are unable to complete the download. This issue is preventing access to the app they need.

description: User is trying to download the VitalSource Bookshelf app from the Microsoft Store. They are unable to complete the download. This issue is preventing access to the app they need.
